Dancing Crane Karigane
fields.description: Comprised of both leaf and stalk from shade-grown tea only. The dry leaf is an attractive color contrast and the cup is gentle and bright with fresh vegetal flavors.

fields.name: Dragon Pixin
fields.description: White tea is known to be one of the most delicate tea varieties because it is so minimally processed. White tea is harvested before the tea plant's leaves open fully, when the young buds are still covered by fine white hairs, hence the name “white” tea.

fields.name: Yodeling
fields.description: A rich and visceral cup singing the songs of its mountain home. Soft, feathery fields of grain in body and texture. The aromatics hit the high notes and refine the edges of its rugged character.

fields.name: Margadzip
fields.description: Coffee based on “elephant grain” (the nickname is explained by the fact that the size of the fruit is almost three times greater than usual Arabica), presented in our online store: Maragogjep Nicaragua and Maraggiup Mexico is characterized by a rich smell and sweet chocolate taste, as well as a thicker consistency.

fields.name: Ethiopia Mocceaux
fields.description: Premium varietal category, the value of which gourmets explain the pleasant fruit-wine taste. Coffee trees have preserved the traditional properties characteristic of the original varieties, which determines the delicacy and balance of the aroma. One of the most popular varieties is Arabica Sidoma. Which is also presented in our online store: Coffee Santa Fe "Ethiopia Sidoma" or Coffee Santa Fe "Sidide Gold of Ethiopia".

fields.name: Excels
fields.description: Another representative of the South American country, classified as Arabic for washing, and growing 1.2 km above sea level. The taste of the drink is initially identified as a combination of citrus and cocoa, and in the aftertaste - shows the atrocity of spices and prunes. Recommended for the preparation of cocktails on a milk basis.

fields.name: Tea Filter Bags
fields.description: Tea Filter Bags for Loose Tea, 200pcs Disposable Empty Loose Leaf Tea Bags (2.76 x 3.54 inch, 3.15 x 3.94 inch)

fields.name: TS Tea Strainer
fields.description: Shin-Etsu Works TS Tea Strainer, Made in Japan, Stainless Steel, Commercial Use, Wooden Handle, Deep Type, II

fields.name: Coffee Bar Organizer
fields.description: Mind Reader Coffee, Tea or Condiment Station, Countertop Organizer, Coffee Bar, Acrylic, 7.75"L x 7.75"W x 3.5"H, Clear

fields.name: Dedica Style
fields.description: De'Longhi Dedica Style, Traditional Pump Espresso Machine, Coffee and Cappuccino Maker, EC685M, Silver

fields.name: LM9012/60
fields.description: Versuni PHILIPS L'OR Barista Sublime Capsule Coffee Machine, Double Shot, 1 or 2 Cups, Full Coffee Menu, Black (LM9012/60)

fields.name: Profitec GO
fields.description: Looking to keep your mornings moving when you’re on the go? Look no further than the Profitec GO. This sleek single boiler espresso machine has best-in-class features like PID temperature control and a fast heat-up time.
